popularStory.description: Sir Walter Hungerford of Farley (died c.1596) was an English landowner. In his lifetime he was popularly referred to as the "Knight of Farley" for his renowned sporting abilities. In his youth he reco …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter Hungerford 1st Baron Hungerford of Heytesbury於大約1503年出生在英國維爾爾海斯波利時，他的父親Sir Edward Hungerford32歲，母親Jane de la Zouche30歲。他於大約1524年與Lady Susan Danvers結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1536年被列為created baron hungerford of heytesbury。他去世於1540年7月28日在英國米德萊可倫敦享年38歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter Hungerford 1st Baron Hungerford of Heytesbury于大约1503年出生在英国維爾爾海斯波利时，他的父亲Sir Edward Hungerford32岁，母亲Jane de la Zouche30岁。他于大约1524年与Lady Susan Danvers结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1536年被列为created baron hungerford of heytesbury。他去世于1540年7月28日在英国米德萊可倫敦享年38岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Hungerford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Hungerford (Berkshire), from Old English hungor ‘hunger’, here probably denoting unproductive land, + ford. This surname has been established in Ireland since the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Walter Hungerford 1st Baron Hungerford of Heytesbury was born about 1503, in Heytesbury, Wiltshire, England, his father, Sir Edward Hungerford, was 32 and his mother, Jane de la Zouche, was 30. He married Lady Susan Danvers about 1524. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. In 1536, at the age of 34, his occupation is listed as created baron hungerford of heytesbury. He died on 28 July 1540, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 38, and was buried in London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter Hungerford 1st Baron Hungerford of Heytesbury est né environ 1503, à Heytesbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Edward Hungerford, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Jane de la Zouche, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Lady Susan Danvers environ 1524. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. En 1536, à l’âge de 34 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est created baron hungerford of heytesbury. Il est décédé le 28 juillet 1540, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter Hungerford 1st Baron Hungerford of Heytesbury um 1503 in Heytesbury, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Edward Hungerford 32 und seine Mutter Jane de la Zouche 30. Er hat um 1524 Lady Susan Danvers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. 1536, als er 34 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als created baron hungerford of heytesbury aufgeführt. Er starb am 28. Juli 1540 im Alter von 38 Jahren in London, Middlesex, England und wurde in London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Hungerford 1st Baron Hungerford of Heytesbury è nato il circa 1503 nel Heytesbury, Wiltshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Edward Hungerford, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Jane de la Zouche, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Lady Susan Danvers circa 1524. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Nel 1536, all'età di 34 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come created baron hungerford of heytesbury. Morì il 28 luglio 1540, nel London, Middlesex, England, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolto a London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter Hungerford 1st Baron Hungerford of Heytesburyが約1503年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアヘイテスブリーで生まれた時，父Sir Edward Hungerfordは32歳，母Jane de la Zoucheは30歳であった。約1524年にLady Susan Danversと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1536年，34歳の時，職業はcreated baron hungerford of heytesburyと記録されている。彼は1540年7月28日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで38歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter Hungerford 1st Baron Hungerford of Heytesbury(이)가 대략 1503년 영국 윌츠히르 헤이츠버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Edward Hungerford(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane de la Zouche(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1524년 Lady Susan Danvers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1536년, 34세의 나이로 그의 직업은 created baron hungerford of heytesbury이었다. 그는 1540년 7월 28일 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Hungerford 1st Baron Hungerford of Heytesbury nasceu aproximadamente 1503, em Heytesbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Edward Hungerford, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Jane de la Zouche, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Susan Danvers aproximadamente 1524. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Em 1536, com 34 anos, sua profissão aparece como created baron hungerford of heytesbury. Ele faleceu em 28 de julho de 1540, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 38 anos, e foi sepultado em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter Hungerford 1st Baron Hungerford of Heytesbury родился около 1503 г. в местности хитсбури, уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Edward Hungerford было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Jane de la Zouche, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Susan Danvers около 1524 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. В 1536 году, в возрасте 34 лет,  он работал по профессии created baron hungerford of heytesbury. Он умер 28 июля 1540 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter Hungerford 1st Baron Hungerford of Heytesbury nació aproximadamente 1503, en Heytesbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Edward Hungerford, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Jane de la Zouche, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Lady Susan Danvers aproximadamente 1524. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. En 1536, a la edad de 34 años, su ocupación registrada era created baron hungerford of heytesbury. Murió el 28 de julio de 1540, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultado en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
